scripts.setup: npm ci && npm run setup:simba && npm run setup:odinhire && npm run setup:limeread && npm run setup:sentinel
scripts.build:simba: if [ -d src/simba/node_modules ]; then npm run build:css --prefix src/simba; else echo 'Skipping Simba CSS build: run "npm run setup:simba" to install Simba dependencies.'; fi
scripts.build:odinhire: if [ -d src/odinhire/node_modules ]; then npm run build:css --prefix src/odinhire; else echo 'Skipping Odinhire CSS build: run "npm run setup:odinhire" to install Odinhire dependencies.'; fi
scripts.build:limeread: if [ -d src/limeread/node_modules ]; then npm run build:css --prefix src/limeread; else echo 'Skipping Limeread CSS build: run "npm run setup:limeread" to install Limeread dependencies.'; fi
scripts.build:sentinel: if [ -d src/sentinel/node_modules ]; then npm run build:css --prefix src/sentinel; fi
scripts.start:simba: if [ -d src/simba/node_modules ]; then npx eleventy --serve --incremental & npm run watch:css --prefix src/simba; else echo 'Simba dependencies not installed: run "npm run setup:simba" first to enable start:simba.'; fi
scripts.start:odinhire: if [ -d src/odinhire/node_modules ]; then npx eleventy --serve --incremental & npm run watch:css --prefix src/odinhire; else echo 'Odinhire dependencies not installed: run "npm run setup:odinhire" first to enable start:odinhire.'; fi
scripts.start:limeread: if [ -d src/limeread/node_modules ]; then npx eleventy --serve --incremental & npm run watch:css --prefix src/limeread; else echo 'Limeread dependencies not installed: run "npm run setup:limeread" first to enable start:limeread.'; fi
scripts.build: env NODE_ENV=production npx tailwindcss -i ./tailwind.css -o ./css/tailwind.css --minify && npx eleventy --pathprefix=$BASE_PATH && npm run build:simba && npm run build:odinhire && npm run build:limeread && npm run build:sentinel
scripts.start: npx eleventy --serve  & npx tailwindcss -i ./tailwind.css -o ./css/tailwind.css --watch & npm run watch:css --prefix src/limeread
